race.comment: DOUBLE WHAMMY (5) resumes here but the form he showed when last in work was impressive and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Tuned up for this with two recent trials and can run a big race while fresh. PIREONTI (4) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome at the latest effort but go on the strong first-up victory. Capable of bouncing right back. BRAIN WAVE (12) is drawn to get a gun run from the inside alley. In the mix. Stable reported that INQUISITOR (11) may not have loved the travel down to Grafton last time. Didn't run his race. Efforts prior are better than that and he's closer to home today.
